---
title: "Week 11"
order: 4
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
source("../visualisation_funcs.R")
```
### Homework week 10

In the late 1990s and early 2000s, American hip-hop was marked by a West Coast vs. East Coast feud, with fans strongly aligned to one side. The rivalry ultimately led to the deaths of Tupac and Biggie. For this week, I made a chordagram for the song 'Give me the Loot' by The Notorius B.I.G. I chose this song as it is statistically the most east-coast, meaning its audio profile sits closest to the overall average of all East Coast tracks (Only considering spotify's features). 


#### Listen to Give me the Loot by The Notorius B.I.G.
<audio controls style="width: 100%;">
  <source src="gmtl.m4a" type="audio/mp4">
</audio>

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
gen_tempogram_grid("gmtl", "Tempogram of Give Me The Loot by The Notorius B.I.G")
```
